race.description: Thelma Coster – Life Member Mdn Plate
race.comment: JENNI POPPINS (10) went forward last start over 1200m at Pakenham and held on well for second, beaten 2 lengths. Knocking on the door and can go one better in a winnable race with Williams booked. TISSEYRE (12) is racing well without winning. Last start finished second, beaten 0.8 lengths, over 1600m at Cranbourne and won't need to improve much to be breaking through. EXPANDING POWER (8) ran a credible race last time out at the second run of the campaign and finished 4 lengths from the winner in third over 1400m at Pakenham. Each-way chance again. ENCHANTED LASS (7) is knocking on the door and maps well having just found one better last time, respecting.
